# waiting-hard ⏳😤

![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/original-flipster69/waiting-hard)
![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Java_21-grey?logo=openjdk&logoColor=white&labelColor=grey&color=e11f21)
![original.flipster](https://img.shields.io/badge/-original.flipster-grey?logo=data%3Aimage%2Fgif%3Bbase64%&logoSize=auto&labelColor=grey&color=292524)

A terminal-based countdown tracker for pending submissions and exam results. Built with Java and [Lanterna](https://github.com/mabe02/lanterna) for a text-UI experience.

## Requirements

- Java 21+
- Maven

## Build & Run

```bash
mvn compile exec:java
```

## Controls

- `s` — toggle between max and estimated wait times
- `q` / `Esc` — quit
